raw:
## Completed
Implemented Phase D real-ship commit action gates for Foreman. Gate 2 approval now runs declared release action gates, with built-in best-effort `commit` support, while no release action gate preserves existing behavior.

## Files Changed
- `extensions/foreman/ship.ts` - new pure ship helpers for commit messages, safe stage paths, commit decisions.
- `extensions/foreman/index.ts` - wires release action gates into Gate 2 approval and runs scoped git commit via argv-based spawn.
- `extensions/foreman/gates.ts` - adds optional `paths?: string[]` for action gates.
- `extensions/foreman/test/ship_test.sh` - headless tests for ship helpers.

## How To Verify
```bash
node --check extensions/foreman/index.ts && grep -q "claude-opus-4-8:xhigh" extensions/foreman/crew/planner.md && bash extensions/foreman/test/ship_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_timeout_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/gates_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/reviewer_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/guard_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/fallback_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/ledger_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/dashboard/test/reader_test.sh
```

## Notes
No push, branch creation, or PR logic added. Commit action is best-effort/non-fatal; unknown release actions are logged and skipped.

## MACHINE BLOCK (MANDATORY — end your response with this exact block)
